lines.hearsay: A piece of paper changed hands at {place}, and nothing was said over it.
lines.gossip: {A} slid the notice across the table at {place} to {B} — the good one, the one {A} had read twice and decided against — and never once said whose idea it had been.
lines.report: {A} transferred an unclaimed notice to {B} at {place}, slot {slot}.
